topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

sections.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing. Rules: Simple Future: action that will happen (I will eat rice) | Future Continuous: ongoing action at a future time (I will be eating rice at 8 pm) | Future Perfect: action completed before a future point (I will have eaten rice by 8 pm) | Future Perfect Continuous: ongoing action up to a future point (I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm)
sections.formula: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: मैं कल चावल खाऊँगा।
examples.english: I will eat rice tomorrow.

examples.hindi: 8 बजे मैं खाना खा रहा होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will be eating food at 8 pm.

examples.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं खाना खा चुका होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.

examples.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.

examples.hindi: वह कल काम पर जाएगी।
examples.english: She will go to work tomorrow.

examples.hindi: 5 बजे वह काम कर रही होगी।
examples.english: She will be working at 5 pm.

sections.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
examples.english: She will have finished her work by 5 pm.

examples.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही होगी।
examples.english: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.

examples.hindi: वे कल स्कूल जाएंगे।
examples.english: They will go to school tomorrow.

examples.hindi: 3 बजे वे खेल रहे होंगे।
examples.english: They will be playing at 3 pm.

examples.hindi: 3 बजे तक वे homework कर चुके होंगे।
examples.english: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.

examples.hindi: 3 बजे तक वे एक घंटे से खेल रहे होंगे।
examples.english: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.

sections.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: मैं कल सुबह exercise करूँगा।
examples.english: I will exercise tomorrow morning.

examples.hindi: 7 बजे मैं पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will be reading at 7 pm.

examples.hindi: 7 बजे तक मैं यह किताब पढ़ चुका होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will have read this book by 7 pm.

examples.hindi: 7 बजे तक मैं तीन घंटे से पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
examples.english: I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.

sections.title: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + will + V1 | will + be + V1+ing | will have + V3 | will have + been + V1+ing

examples.hindi: वह अगले हफ्ते एक गाना गाएगा।
examples.english: He will sing a song next week.

examples.hindi: 6 बजे वह गा रहा होगा।
examples.english: He will be singing at 6 pm.

examples.hindi: 6 बजे तक वह गाना गा चुका होगा।
examples.english: He will have sung the song by 6 pm.

examples.hindi: 6 बजे तक वह आधे घंटे से गा रहा होगा।
examples.english: He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
